general.title: Analysis to CSV [SPAC] [DMAP]
general.instructions: Export a specified table with all annotations from an upstream analysis to a CSV file.  Please refer to DUET Documentation for further information.

parameters.name: Table to Export
parameters.description: Source table to be exported. Default is Original.

parameters.name: Save as CSV File
parameters.description: If True, export the data as a single csv file, otherwise, export the data as a dataset that can be manipulated in NIDAP.
